abstract: This recommendation provides a formal definition for the term “halogen bond,” identifying it as a specific category of noncovalent interaction. It characterizes the halogen bond as a net attractive engagement between an electrophilic region on a halogen atom and a nucleophilic region within the same or a separate molecular entity. Consistent with IUPAC nomenclature, this definition distinguishes these interactions from those where a halogen acts as a nucleophile, such as in hydrogen bonding. In addition to the formal definition, this document outlines the structural, energetic, and spectroscopic features that serve as evidence for the presence of a halogen bond.
